Welcome to Jackson House

Now Open, we're ushering in a new era of hospitality in Woodinville, WA. We specialize in curated cocktails and artisanal local cuisine. You're invited to experience Jackson House - where every cocktail, plate, and detail is crafted with purpose.

Reserve your table on OpenTable. The finest in Woodinville awaits!

Upcoming Events

Join us for special tastings, dinners, and celebrations.

May 3

Tequila Guided Tasting - Cinco de Mayo-ish!

Members Only

4:30pm - 6:00pm 14 guests $45 / guest
May 17

Harvest Dinner

6:30pm - 10:00pm 36 guests $145 / guest

What People Are Saying

"Chef Lauren and her excellent team have done it again! Jackson House is a winner and hands down, the best restaurant in Woodinville."

— Mike S. (Yelp)

"This may have been the most accommodating, friendly, and passionate restaurant we have been to."

— Danielle H. (Google Reviews)

"Amazing. I've been here twice now, and it's instantly become a local favorite spot."

— Hernan C. (Yelp)

"One of my friends said, “I didn't like lamb BUT now I do.” i can’t wait to go back."

— Sabrina C. (Facebook)

"Husband and I came in for our anniversary and truly had one of the best meals ever."

— Autumn S. (Google Reviews)

"Fabulous little Woodinville gem in dark moody colors with excellent food, cocktails, and exceptional service."

— Julie L. (Yelp)

"Folks, if your not coming here, your missing out. The ambiance, the staff from door to table/bar are amazing, the chef, are all fabulous. "

— PeeVee (Google Reviews)

"Great addition to downtown Woodinville - a much needed restaurant with excellent cocktails and high end food that has been missing in the area."

— Ben D. (Google Reviews)

"My favorite place in Woodinville. "

— Ralph N. (Google Reviews)

"I had such a lovely experience. I can't wait to return, the food was so delicious."

— Cristi C. (Yelp)

"This is hands down THE best place to eat in woodinville."

— Samantha C. (Google Reviews)

"Then came the showstopper: charred lamb rib chops, tender and perfumed with just enough smoke to tease out their natural sweetness. It was the kind of dish that makes you pause mid-bite, recalibrating your expectations for what Woodinville dining can be."

— advinetures.ca

"The lamb chops were so good I almost cried."

— Andrew N. (Google Reviews)
